title: Creamy Mediterranean Lentil Soup
description: A velvety, buttery lentil soup bursting with Mediterranean flavors, finished with creamy full-fat yogurt and fresh herbs.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large pot over medium heat. Add butter and let it melt, stirring to combine.
Sauté onion, garlic, carrots, and celery until softened, about 5 minutes.
Stir in lentils, tomatoes, cumin, and salt, cooking for 2 minutes to toast the spices.
Pour in vegetable broth, bring to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 25–30 minutes until lentils are tender.
Use an immersion blender to puree about half the soup in the pot, leaving a few lentil pieces for texture.
Fold in ¾ cup of the Greek yogurt, stirring until the soup is creamy and heated through.
Stir in lemon juice, adjust seasoning with salt and pepper, and remove from heat.
Serve hot, drizzled with a swirl of the remaining yogurt, topped with chopped parsley.
